content.text: I found `ZipUtils` and the v3 config controller import/export paths. Next I’ll inspect the full import method and constants to understand why `meta_data` is not detected and whether legacy format is still supported.

I found the v3 import path dereferences `unziped.getMetaDataItem()` without a null check, while `ZipUtils` only recognizes `.meta.yml` and `.metadata.yml`; the reported `meta_data` file name is not recognized, which reproduces the null `metaDataItem` failure path.

I found that both the v3 config controller and the console inner handler currently write/read `.metadata.yml`, while the report describes `meta_data`; I’m checking existing import/export compatibility tests to understand supported legacy formats before adding a focused reproduction.

18	
19	import com.alibaba.nacos.api.utils.StringUtils;
20	
21	import java.util.HashMap;
22	import java.util.Map;
23	
24	/**
25	 * Config data type.
26	 *
27	 * @author liaochuntao
28	 **/
29	public enum ConfigType {
30	    
31	    /**
32	     * config type is "properties".
33	     */
34	    PROPERTIES("properties"),
35	    
36	    /**
37	     * config type is "xml".
38	     */
39	    XML("xml"),
40	    
41	    /**
42	     * config type is "json".
43	     */
44	    JSON("json"),
45	    
46	    /**
47	     * config type is "text".
48	     */
49	    TEXT("text"),
50	    
51	    /**
52	     * config type is "html".
53	     */
54	    HTML("html"),
55	    
56	    /**
57	     * config type is "yaml".
58	     */
59	    YAML("yaml"),
60	    
61	    /**
62	     * config type is "toml".
63	     */
64	    TOML("toml"),
65	    
66	    /**
67	     * not a real type.
68	     */
69	    UNSET("unset");
70	    
71	    private final String type;
72	    
73	    private static final Map<String, ConfigType> LOCAL_MAP = new HashMap<>();
74	    
75	    static {
76	        for (ConfigType configType : values()) {
77	            LOCAL_MAP.put(configType.getType(), configType);
78	        }
79	    }
80	    
81	    ConfigType(String type) {
82	        this.type = type;
83	    }
84	    
85	    public String getType() {
86	        return type;
87	    }
88	    
89	    public static ConfigType getDefaultType() {
90	        return TEXT;
91	    }
92	    
93	    /**
94	     * check input type is valid.
95	     *
96	     * @param type config type
97	     * @return it the type valid
98	     */
99	    public static Boolean isValidType(String type) {
100	        if (StringUtils.isBlank(type)) {
101	            return false;
102	        }
103	        return null != LOCAL_MAP.get(type);
104	    }
105	}

content.text:
Implemented the config import/export fix without committing changes.

Summary:
- Added support for recognizing `meta_data` as a ZIP metadata entry in `ZipUtils`.
- Added `meta_data` generation during export, alongside existing `.metadata.yml`, so console-exported ZIPs are compatible with expected import structure.
- Fixed import handling to return `METADATA_ILLEGAL` instead of throwing a null-pointer error when metadata is missing.
- Added parser support for `meta_data` lines in the format:
  ```text
  GROUP|dataId|tenantId
  ```
- Applied the import/export handling in both:
  - `config/src/main/java/com/alibaba/nacos/config/server/controller/v3/ConfigControllerV3.java`
  - `console/src/main/java/com/alibaba/nacos/console/handler/impl/inner/config/ConfigInnerHandler.java`
- Removed the temporary regression tests as requested.

Validation performed:
- Temporarily added regression coverage for:
  - `ZipUtils` recognizing `meta_data`
  - console export including metadata
  - console import accepting `meta_data`
- Ran focused validation successfully:
  ```bash
  ./mvnw -pl config -Dtest=ZipUtilsTest test
  ./mvnw -pl config,console -am -Dtest=ZipUtilsTest,ConfigInnerHandlerTest test -Dsurefire.failIfNoSpecifiedTests=false
  ```
- Restored the temporary test edits afterward.

Remaining modified files:
- `config/src/main/java/com/alibaba/nacos/config/server/constant/Constants.java`
- `config/src/main/java/com/alibaba/nacos/config/server/controller/v3/ConfigControllerV3.java`
- `config/src/main/java/com/alibaba/nacos/config/server/utils/ZipUtils.java`
- `console/src/main/java/com/alibaba/nacos/console/handler/impl/inner/config/ConfigInnerHandler.java`
